_comment: MiOS MCP server registry. The mios-system entry was previously pointed at /usr/bin/mios-status --mcp-mode, but mios-status (a dashboard wrapper duplicate of mios-dash) was removed in v0.2.4 and never implemented --mcp-mode. The dashboard itself is rendered by /usr/libexec/mios/mios-dashboard.sh; an MCP exposure is on the v0.3 roadmap.
